description:
Perform a data quality audit on the MedinTux patient database (MySQL, user: root, no password, database: DrTuxTest). Validate the Social Security Numbers (NIR) in the 'FchPat_NumSS' column of the 'fchpat' table against official French validation rules (15 digits, specific structure, and Modulo 97 control key). 

Generate a report at /home/ga/nir_audit_report.txt categorizing every patient as VALID (correct format and key), INVALID_FORMAT (wrong length, non-numeric, or invalid codes), INVALID_KEY (correct format but wrong key), or MISSING (empty or NULL). 

The report must follow this exact format, with detailed findings sorted alphabetically by Last Name:

NIR VALIDATION AUDIT REPORT
Total patients audited: <number>

SUMMARY
VALID: <count>
INVALID_FORMAT: <count>
INVALID_KEY: <count>
MISSING: <count>

DETAILED FINDINGS
<CATEGORY> | <LastName> <FirstName> | NIR: <value>
...
